name: claude-mem-codex
description: Share an existing claude-mem knowledge base between Claude Code and Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Shared memory for Claude Code and Codex.
interface.longDescription: Connects Codex lifecycle hooks and memory search to an existing claude-mem installation, with optional cross-recall in both CLIs.
defaultPrompt: Search memory for relevant prior work.
